title: Jacko Notifier
description: This mod is a dedicated utility for the OriginRealms server, designed to help players track the specific refresh cycles of the Jacko Farmer merchant.
body:
# 📝 ABOUT **Jacko Notifier** is an essential HUD for Minecraft, specifically created for the [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/) community. It eliminates all uncertainty regarding Jacko's Market cycles by providing a real-time countdown directly on your screen. You will receive an instant notification as soon as the shop inventory resets, ensuring you never miss a restock. # 🎉 FEATURES ⏰ Automatically calculates the time remaining until Jacko's refresh
🔔 Animated popup and sound alert at the moment of refresh
🛠️ Fully movable HUD via configuration menu
⌨️ Toggle visibility with a quick keybind
Keybinds Y Key: Opens the configuration menu.

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1457826164939821058?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=5865F2&label=DISCORD)](https://discord.gg/4VjFh9pUqQ) ![AndreDev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea8d432834ebd74118f59d48350120950d64f7b.png) # 🫂 PARTNER WITH [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1346027647762694194?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&color=5865F2&label=DISCORD)](https://discord.gg/cuv5vuCC) ![OR Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ce8314f6acf6f25e43cc420e6f03862acc7ce1.png)
